/usr/bin/cc -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/ZeldaLike.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/ZeldaLike.dir/src/game.c.o CMakeFiles/ZeldaLike.dir/src/main.c.o -o ZeldaLike  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libSDL2.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libSDL2_image.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libSDL2_mixer.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libSDL2_ttf.so
